phrases: Please do not talk during the lesson because everyone is trying to listen carefully.
It rained during the whole day, so we stayed at home and watched movies.
During the meeting, everyone shared their ideas and asked useful questions.
My phone rang during dinner, but I decided to answer it later.
During our trip to the mountains, we saw many beautiful lakes and forests.
She learned a lot of new words during her English course last summer.
The ice will melt in the warm sun before the afternoon is over.
Chocolate can melt very quickly if you leave it in a hot car.
The snow started to melt after two days of warm spring weather.
Butter melts slowly when you cook it in a small pan.
The candle began to melt and the wax fell onto the table.
The frozen cheese did not melt because the oven was not hot enough.
We usually arrive at school before eight because we like to be early.
The bus should arrive in about ten minutes if there is no traffic.
They arrived at the hotel late after a long and tiring journey.
Please arrive on time because the movie starts exactly at seven.
My parents will arrive tomorrow evening after their business trip.
The train arrived at the station a few minutes earlier than expected.
We walked through the old park and enjoyed the fresh morning air.
The warm sunlight came through the window and filled the whole room.
She looked through the photos before choosing her favorite picture.
The small river flows through the village and makes it very beautiful.
He carefully read through the email before sending his reply.
We drove through the city center on our way to the airport.
Dark clouds covered the sky before the heavy rain finally started.
Please cover the food with a clean plate to keep it fresh.
Snow covered the roads and the trees during the cold winter night.
She covered her face with her hands because the wind was very strong.
The tall tree covers our garden with cool shade in summer.
A soft blanket covered the sleeping baby and kept him warm.
It might rain later this afternoon, so take your umbrella with you.
She might come to the party if she finishes her work early.
We might visit our grandparents this weekend if the weather is nice.
He might know the answer because he read the book yesterday.
You might feel tired after such a long walk in the mountains.
The shop might be closed because today is a public holiday.
The desert is very hot during the day but cold at night.
Only a few plants can grow in the dry desert without much water.
They traveled across the desert with a guide and plenty of water.
Many animals have special ways to live in the desert for years.
The desert looked endless with sand stretching in every direction.
We watched a documentary about people who live near the desert.
He is an honest person who always tells the truth to everyone.
Please be honest with me even if the answer is difficult to say.
An honest friend will help you when you have a serious problem.
She gave an honest opinion about my project and it really helped.
People usually trust someone who is honest and kind to others.
It is important to stay honest even when nobody is watching you.
Please tell me the truth because I want to understand what happened.
The truth finally became clear after everyone shared their story.
Sometimes the truth is difficult to hear, but it is still important.
He promised to tell the truth no matter what happened next.
Finding the truth can take time if the problem is complicated.
The teacher asked the students to always speak the truth in class.
The children laughed together because the funny game was so exciting.
His jokes always make everyone laugh at family dinners.
I could not stop laughing after my friend told a funny story.
We laughed loudly while watching a really funny comedy movie.
Even the teacher started to laugh after hearing the clever answer.
She smiled and laughed when she saw the old family photos.
Please call me when you arrive safely at the train station.
I call my grandparents every Sunday to ask how they are doing.
She called her best friend to share the good news immediately.
Can you call a taxi because it is getting late outside?
My boss called me this morning to discuss tomorrow's meeting.
If you need any help, just call me and I will come.
We prepare dinner together every evening and talk about our day.
She is preparing carefully for the English test next Monday.
They prepared everything before the guests arrived at their house.
You should prepare your bag the night before an early trip.
The team prepared a short presentation for the important meeting.
I need to prepare some sandwiches before we leave for the picnic.
I want to try this new restaurant tomorrow.
Please try to finish your homework today.
She tried to answer every question correctly.
Don't be afraid to try something different.
We should try again after a short break.
He tried his best but still lost.
